MSTR.name: Strategy (MicroStrategy)
MSTR.description: The largest corporate Bitcoin holder, formerly known as MicroStrategy. Pioneered the Bitcoin treasury strategy under Michael Saylor.

MARA.name: MARA Holdings
MARA.description: One of the largest publicly traded Bitcoin mining companies in North America.

RIOT.name: Riot Platforms
RIOT.description: A leading Bitcoin mining company focused on building and operating data center infrastructure.

COIN.name: Coinbase Global
COIN.description: The largest cryptocurrency exchange in the United States, holding Bitcoin on its balance sheet.

CLSK.name: CleanSpark
CLSK.description: An American Bitcoin mining company focused on sustainable energy sources.

HIVE.name: HIVE Digital Technologies
HIVE.description: A global green-energy focused Bitcoin mining company operating in Canada, Sweden, and Iceland.
